title: WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm duplicate Drop+Connection impls
description: In wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs, WolfTpmLinuxDev and WolfTpmSwtpm have identical fields (dev: Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV>), identical Drop impls, and identical Connection impls (both delegate to do_transact). The only difference is construction. A private shared newtype WolfTpmDev(Box<WOLFTPM2_DEV>) with a single Drop and a single Connection impl would let both public structs be thin wrappers around it, eliminating the duplication.
